Get all static bestiary classes with their current creature counts.
Get all static bestiary categories with their current creature counts.
Get all creatures that belong to a specific bestiary category.
Get all bestiary difficulty levels with their static kill requirements and charm points.
Get all creatures that belong to a specific bestiary difficulty.

Get all bestiary creatures with their charm point rewards and total kill requirements. Use the optional sort query parameter. Allowed values: name, bestiary-class, category, difficulty, charm-points, total-kills, last-updated.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Optional sort field. Allowed values: name, bestiary-class, category, difficulty, charm-points, total-kills, last-updated.

parameters.name: descending
parameters.description: Optional. Set to true to return the result in descending order.

get.description: Get bestiary creatures using the optional filters bestiaryClass, category, difficulty, charmPointReward, creatureName and sort. Allowed sort values: name, bestiary-class, category, difficulty, charm-points, total-kills, last-updated.

parameters.name: bestiaryClass
parameters.description: Optional filter for the bestiary class, for example Humanoid or humanoid.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Optional filter for the bestiary category, for example Humanoid or Vermin.

parameters.name: difficulty
parameters.description: Optional filter for the bestiary difficulty, for example Harmless, Trivial, Easy, Medium or Hard.

parameters.name: charmPointReward
parameters.description: Optional filter for the exact charm point reward.

parameters.name: creatureName
parameters.description: Optional creature name search.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Optional sort field. Allowed values: name, bestiary-class, category, difficulty, charm-points, total-kills, last-updated.

parameters.name: descending
parameters.description: Optional. Set to true to return the result in descending order.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Optional page number. Starts at 1.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Optional page size. Allowed range: 1 to 250.

get.description: Returns a list of all books available from TibiaWiki.
Returns the full details of a book for the specified name.
Returns the full details of a book for the specified ID.
Returns the sync state for all books, including ID, last updated, and last seen timestamps.

get.summary: Get book sync states by date
get.description: Returns the sync states of all books updated for the specified date or timestamp filter.

parameters.description: Optional sort field. Allowed values: name, category, total-points, total-kills, last-updated.

get.description: Get bosstiary creatures using the optional filters category, totalPoints, creatureName and sort. Allowed sort values: name, category, total-points, total-kills, last-updated.

parameters.name: totalPoints
parameters.description: Optional filter for the exact total point reward.

parameters.name: creatureName

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Optional sort field. Allowed values: name, category, total-points, total-kills, last-updated.

parameters.name: descending
parameters.description: Optional. Set to true to return the result in descending order.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Optional page number. Starts at 1.

parameters.description: Optional page size. Allowed range: 1 to 250.

get.summary: Get API schema and data version information
get.description: Returns the current public schema version and a data version fingerprint for sync and cache-aware clients.
Returns a public snapshot manifest for clients that want to build or refresh a full local mirror of the API.
Returns a pollable delta feed for clients that want centralized change notifications across public resources. The since parameter is required and must be a UTC timestamp.

Searches common public resources such as creatures, items, books, hunting places, NPCs, spells, and more by name or title.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Required search text. Minimum 2 characters.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Optional comma-separated resource types such as creatures,items,books,npcs.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of hits to return. Default 20, maximum 50.

get.summary: Get all perk names grouped by vocation
get.description: Retrieves a complete list of all active Wheel of Destiny perk names, grouped by vocation.
Retrieves a paged list of Wheel of Destiny perks. Optional filters: vocation, type, search. Supported sort values: name, vocation, type.

get.summary: Get gem sync states by date

HuntingPlaceAdditionalAttributes.description:
DTO representing the AdditionalAttributesJson structure for hunting places.
Contains lower level areas and other additional data.

HuntingPlaceInfobox.description: DTO representing the InfoboxJson structure for hunting places stored in the database.

HuntingPlaceLowerLevel.description: DTO representing a lower level area within a hunting place.
